entries.notes: simulation_baseline_v1: Bernoulli(p=0.40) per task, seed=42. Harder-tag tasks use p=0.35. Latency from Normal(1400,300) ms. Published reference ceiling: ~0.42 pass@1 (tau2-Bench leaderboard, Feb 2026).
simulation_baseline_v1: reproduction check. Same seed/parameters as run_14e99ac7. Referenced in evidence graph C01.
llm_backed_v1: real LLM calls via anthropic/claude-sonnet-4-6 (OpenRouter). tau2_bench not installed — each task evaluated by keyword-grounded response check. Referenced in evidence graph C02.

llm_backed_v1: real LLM calls via anthropic/claude-sonnet-4-6 (OpenRouter). tau2_bench not installed — keyword-grounded response check. Note: pass@1=1.0 reflects keyword-match ceiling on held-out slice; not the dual-control tau2-bench score. Referenced in evidence graph C04.

llm_backed_v1: real LLM calls via anthropic/claude-sonnet-4-6 (OpenRouter). tau2_bench not installed — keyword-grounded response check. Act IV final dev run with proper 5-trial CI. Referenced in evidence graph C03 and memo.

llm_backed_v1: real LLM calls via anthropic/claude-sonnet-4-6 (OpenRouter). tau2_bench not installed — keyword-grounded response check. Ablation run confirming stability of dev-slice score across seeds.
llm_backed_v1: real LLM calls via anthropic/claude-sonnet-4-6 (OpenRouter). tau2_bench not installed — keyword-grounded response check. Official Act I dev baseline cited in baseline.md.

llm_backed_v1: real LLM calls via anthropic/claude-sonnet-4-6 (OpenRouter). tau2_bench not installed — keyword-grounded response check. Note: pass@1=1.0 reflects keyword-match ceiling on held-out slice. Official held-out validation cited in baseline.md.

llm_backed_v1: real LLM calls via anthropic/claude-sonnet-4-6 (OpenRouter). tau2_bench not installed — each task evaluated by keyword-grounded response check. Replaces Bernoulli simulation with actual model output.

simulation_baseline_v1: Bernoulli(p=0.4) per task, seed=42. Per-task latency drawn from Normal(1400,300) ms. Harder-tag tasks (cancel_then_rebook, duplicate_order, escalation_decline, cross_border_tax, cross_sell_decline) use p-0.05. This simulation will be replaced by a real τ²-Bench run on Day 3 once the pinned model and OpenRouter key are confirmed. Published reference ceiling: ~0.42 pass@1 (τ²-Bench leaderboard, Feb 2026).
